extortion.description: Premier Surfaces revenue information is not publicly available. Premier Surfaces is a countertop fabricator and installer, and while it was acquired by Clio Holdings in 2017, its specific revenue figures are not disclosed. Some sources provide company information, including Premier Surface Group LLC, which reports $5.2 million in revenue on RocketReach and Premier Surface & Supply LLC, which reports $1M - $5M on seamless.ai. However, these are separate entities from the Premier Surfaces that was acquired by Clio Holdings
